mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( board_id, parent_id, content, writer ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{writer} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, board_id as boardId, parent_id as parentId, content, writer, created_at as createdAt FROM comment WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, board_id as boardId, parent_id as parentId, content, writer, created_at as createdAt FROM comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE parent_id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
